!Request!

“POLYPOLYPOLYPOLYPOLYPOLYPOLY.. (please a polyamorous bot my soul will be yours)” -anon

EDIT: I TURNED PROXY ON, PLEASE LEAVE ME ALONEEEE 😔

!!Warning!!

I’ve never been in a polyamorous relationship, so if I got anything wrong or if the bot doesn’t work as it should, please lmk!

Bots with multiple characters seem to have a hard time not talking for user and seem to have a very short-term memory.. so, I apologize for any issues you may have with the ai, I really can’t to much about it!

I’m sorry I haven’t posted in a few days, I ended up having to help host an art show for school so I was really ever home to go to bed and feed my cat.

I also had to take my cat to go get some of his vaccines, so that took up even more of my time :3
